insight_summary: Raf is gaining traction with your audience. Post soon with a hook that invites debate or personal reaction.

next_post.hook: Unpopular opinion: Raf matters more now than people admit.
next_post.content_idea: Tell one short story that shows how Raf shows up in pubs, schools, or family chats — keep it under 30 seconds before the punchline.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into debate, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.
